top_signals.title: Policy paper: HM Treasury Market Engagement Group
top_signals.summary: A senior‑level forum for financial market participants to share their views on UK-related developments in financial markets, including gilts and sterling, and broader market themes with the Chancellor of the Exchequer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The Funding: Is the bitcoin bottom in? Crypto funds weigh in
top_signals.summary: Crypto funds share their outlook on bitcoin, the biggest risks ahead, and where they see the best risk-reward opportunities today.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Frank Elderson: Interview with Het Financieele Dagblad
Correspondence: DAO 04/26 Tax Arrangements
top_signals.summary: ‘Dear Accounting Officer’ letters provide advice on accountability, regularity, propriety, value for money and annual accounting exercises.

top_signals.title: Japan’s top bond-trading regional bank buys JGBs after decade break
top_signals.summary: Iyogin Holdings started testing the $7 trillion market in April with small purchases of superlong bonds, according to its CEO.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Mizuho Bank to back Japan-South Korea firms' energy procurement projects
The search for Osamu Dazai’s memory in his hometown Mitaka
top_signals.summary: The novelist's hometown honors his memory, but with many buildings demolished, a pilgrimage is an exercise in imagination.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Commission proposes €540 million in financial relief and other supports for farmers facing fertiliser crisis
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 12 Jun 2026 Today, the European Commission presents measures to help farmers facing sharply rising fertiliser costs and to support Europe's food security, delivering on the recently announced Fertiliser Action Plan.
